This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] light-dark color
  assert_equals: expected "hsl(from currentcolor h s calc(32 + l))" but got "color(srgb 0.32 0.32 0.32)"
[FAIL] light-dark + sibling-index()
  assert_equals: expected "hsl(from currentcolor h s 1)" but got "color(srgb 0.01 0.01 0.01)"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
